Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/summarize -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"title":"Vite Tool","text":"Vite is a build tool for faster web development, featuring a dev server with Hot Module Replacement and optimized build output. It uses native ES modules during development for instant server start. For production, it bundles with Rolldown. Offers framework-agnostic plugin API. First-class TypeScript support. CSS as first-class citizen. Asset optimization with compression. Tree shaking enabled by default. Fast Hot Module Replacement. Growing ecosystem with excellent documentation. Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/summarize -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"title":"Web Development","text":"Modern web development involves multiple tools and frameworks. Build tools automate the bundling process. Development servers provide instant feedback. Hot reloading speeds up iteration. TypeScript adds type safety. CSS preprocessing adds features. Asset optimization improves performance. Tree shaking removes unused code. Module resolution handles dependencies. Plugin systems allow extensibility. Ecosystem maturity provides stability. Community support offers resources. Documentation helps adoption. Performance matters for user experience. Developer experience attracts developers. Tooling improves productivity significantly."}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/summarize -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"title":"Vite Build Tool Complete","text":"Vite is a build tool for faster web development featuring a dev server with Hot Module Replacement and optimized build output. It uses native ES modules during development for instant server start and blazingly fast Hot Module Replacement. For production builds Vite bundles your code using Rolldown for optimal performance. The framework agnostic core provides an extensible plugin API that allows customization of every aspect of your build process. Vite offers first-class TypeScript support with automatic type checking during builds. CSS is treated as a first-class citizen with CSS modules preprocessor support and CSS-in-JS integration. Asset handling is optimized with automatic image compression and SVG importing capabilities. The build output is highly optimized with automatic code splitting and tree shaking enabled by default. Vite has excellent documentation and a growing ecosystem of plugins and integrations with popular frameworks. Development experience is significantly enhanced with instant feedback and fast iterations. Performance metrics show Vite is orders of magnitude faster than traditional bundlers. Framework integration includes support for Vue React Svelte and many others. Configuration is minimal and intuitive with sensible defaults out of the box. Community support and ecosystem maturity ensure broad adoption and stability."}')
